_comment: Trimmed GET /types/{id} response (spike #161). Real catalogue data (public). Value-relevant fields drive the metal-value resolver; value/title/issuer are for display; obverse.thumbnail is the catalogue photo the coin gallery renders (#272 x100). The live response also carries reverse/comments/references/edge/mints, omitted here.
title: 1 Dollar "American Silver Eagle" (Bullion Coin)
